summary: Comprehensive testing of Lawyer Helper app completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Partially tested - login/register pages verified, Expo tunnel experiencing intermittent ngrok connectivity issues preventing full UI flow testing.

issues: Using deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should migrate to 'boxShadow' for React Native Web compatibility

infrastructure_issues.issue: Intermittent tunnel connectivity issues - 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading body)', 'remote gone away', 'tunnel took too long to connect'
infrastructure_issues.impact: Prevents consistent frontend testing via public URL

action_items: Consider migrating from deprecated shadow* props to boxShadow in all StyleSheet definitions
Monitor ngrok tunnel stability - may need alternative tunneling solution if issues persist
Add testID attributes to all interactive elements for robust Playwright testing
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded in all API responses
✓ Async/await properly implemented for all DB and AI operations
✓ Proper HTTP status codes (200, 400, 401, 422, 500, 504) with meaningful error messages
✓ AI timeout handling implemented (45s timeout with asyncio.wait_for)
✓ Password hashing with bcrypt (minor warning about __about__ attribute but functional)
✓ Form-data endpoints correctly defined with Form(...) parameters
✓ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, etc.)
✓ StyleSheet.create() used for all styles (no CSS files)
✓ All text wrapped in Text components

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Login/Register pages verified, tunnel issues prevented full flow testing

backend_test_details.auth_register_common: PASS - User registration works with unique emails
backend_test_details.auth_login: PASS - Login returns access_token and user data
backend_test_details.case_analysis: PASS - AI analysis with Gemini 2.5 Flash working (20-30s response time)
backend_test_details.case_history: PASS - Returns array of user's case analyses
backend_test_details.contract_history: PASS - Returns array of user's contract analyses
backend_test_details.legal_procedure: PASS - Returns AI-generated legal procedures for case types
backend_test_details.lawyer_register: PASS - Lawyer registration with specialization fields working
backend_test_details.lawyer_profile: PASS - Returns lawyer details without password_hash

frontend_test_details.login_page: PASS - Login page loads with email/password inputs and login button
frontend_test_details.register_page: PASS - Register page loads with all required fields (name, email, phone, password, user type picker)
frontend_test_details.form_inputs: PASS - All form inputs accept text correctly
frontend_test_details.features_grid: VERIFIED - Home page shows Contract Analysis, Case Analysis, Legal Procedures, Find Lawyers features
frontend_test_details.navigation: PARTIAL - Expo tunnel issues prevented full navigation testing

seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend testing with prefix 'test_' and timestamps. Test lawyers created with specializations (Criminal Law, Civil Law).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional with all 13 endpoints tested and passing. AI integration using Gemini 2.5 Flash is working correctly with proper timeout handling. Frontend React Native app loads correctly but Expo tunnel (ngrok) has intermittent connectivity issues that may require retry or alternative testing approach. When tunnel is stable, frontend shows proper login/register flow. Recommend testing frontend during stable tunnel periods or using local network testing.

ai_integration_notes.error_handling: Proper HTTP status codes (504 for timeout, 402 for budget exceeded, 500 for other errors)

infrastructure_notes.tunnel: ngrok via Expo - experiencing intermittent connectivity issues
infrastructure_notes.supervisor_status: Backend: RUNNING, Expo: RUNNING (but tunnel unstable)
